testcase.name: test_01_load_pet_soul_returns_medical_conditions_arthritis

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'arthritis' in health_conditions, got: assert 'arthritis' in '' + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb5da0f41188>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb5da0f41188> = ''.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_soul_learning_engine_iteration_213.py:71: in test_01_load_pet_soul_returns_medical_conditions_arthritis assert "arthritis" in health_conditions.lower(), \ E AssertionError: Expected 'arthritis' in health_conditions, got: E assert 'arthritis' in '' E + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb5da0f41188>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb5da0f41188> = ''.lower

testcase.name: test_02_mira_chat_returns_memory_trace

failure.message: AssertionError: _memory_trace missing from response. Keys: ['response', 'session_id', 'ticket_id', 'service_desk_ticket_id', 'pillar', 'ticket_type', 'products', 'concierge_action', 'kit_assembly', 'handoff', 'pets', 'selected_pet', 'pet_soul_score', 'research_mode', 'memories_used', 'nearby_places', 'weather', 'quick_prompts', 'quick_replies', 'end_state', 'disclaimer_shown', 'picks_vault', 'os_context', 'picks', 'concierge', 'safety_override', 'missing_profile_fields', 'picks_debug', 'soul_intelligence', 'conversation_contract'] assert '_memory_trace' in {'concierge': {'additional_context': {}, 'cta': 'Want me to coordinate this?', 'cta_prominence': 'secondary', 'mode': 'always_on', ...}, 'concierge_action': None, 'conversation_contract': {'actions': [], 'assistant_message_id': 'MSG-20260218-B7E59', 'mode': 'ticket', 'quick_replies': [{'action': 'open_layer', 'action_args': {'layer': 'services'}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.nav.open', 'id': 'QR-84CD97E7', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.ticket.detail', 'id': 'QR-2A8D2FBB', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.ticket.detail', 'id': 'QR-2751B6EB', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.nav.cancel', 'id': 'QR-0983FF6D', ...}]}, 'disclaimer_shown': False, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_soul_learning_engine_iteration_213.py:95: in test_02_mira_chat_returns_memory_trace assert "_memory_trace" in data, f"_memory_trace missing from response. Keys: {list(data.keys())}" E AssertionError: _memory_trace missing from response. Keys: ['response', 'session_id', 'ticket_id', 'service_desk_ticket_id', 'pillar', 'ticket_type', 'products', 'concierge_action', 'kit_assembly', 'handoff', 'pets', 'selected_pet', 'pet_soul_score', 'research_mode', 'memories_used', 'nearby_places', 'weather', 'quick_prompts', 'quick_replies', 'end_state', 'disclaimer_shown', 'picks_vault', 'os_context', 'picks', 'concierge', 'safety_override', 'missing_profile_fields', 'picks_debug', 'soul_intelligence', 'conversation_contract'] E assert '_memory_trace' in {'concierge': {'additional_context': {}, 'cta': 'Want me to coordinate this?', 'cta_prominence': 'secondary', 'mode': 'always_on', ...}, 'concierge_action': None, 'conversation_contract': {'actions': [], 'assistant_message_id': 'MSG-20260218-B7E59', 'mode': 'ticket', 'quick_replies': [{'action': 'open_layer', 'action_args': {'layer': 'services'}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.nav.open', 'id': 'QR-84CD97E7', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.ticket.detail', 'id': 'QR-2A8D2FBB', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.ticket.detail', 'id': 'QR-2751B6EB', ...}, {'action': 'none', 'action_args': {}, 'analytics_tag': 'qr.nav.cancel', 'id': 'QR-0983FF6D', ...}]}, 'disclaimer_shown': False, ...}
